name: [GRIDHAND] Onboarding Agent - Day 1 → intro call scheduled automatically

gridhand.description: When a new customer books an appointment at Joe's Auto Repair shop, GRIDHAND automatically schedules an introductory call for the next day at 10am, sending a confirmation email to both the customer and the shop owner through integrated calendars like Google Calendar or Microsoft Outlook. This workflow triggers a sequence of personalized communications, starting with the intro call, which the shop owner can use to discuss the customer's vehicle needs and build a relationship, ultimately increasing the chances of converting the booking into a paid service and fostering long-term customer loyalty. By streamlining this initial outreach, Joe's Auto Repair can ensure a consistent and welcoming experience for all new customers, setting the tone for a successful and profitable interaction.
